hooks.command: command -v inotifywait >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'ERROR: inotifywait not found on PATH; install inotify-tools (and coreutils, which provides stdbuf) on this host.' >&2; exit 1; }; command -v stdbuf >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'ERROR: stdbuf not found on PATH; install coreutils on this host.' >&2; exit 1; }; stdbuf -oL inotifywait -m -e create,moved_to inbox/ 2>&1 | /usr/bin/grep --line-buffered ''
